title: **Outputs:**
content:
**Outputs:**
- Syllabi
- Assignment sequences
- Tool use guides (e.g., wordcut syntax, narrative layering)

#### TIER 3 — APPLICATION
**Focus:** Case study use, student-led or collaborative projects
**Outputs:**
- Capstone modules
- Experiments & creative workshops
- Public zines / showcases

---

### III. | EDUCATIONAL APPLICATION BY PROJECT

| Project ID | Tier(s) | Pedagogical Angle |
|----------------|---------|-------------------|
| ::MET4morfoses | 1 / 2 / 3 | Myth engine design, theological recursion, worldbuilding labs |
| ::Q_v33R | 1 / 3 | Personal storytelling, queer theory, podcast workshops |
| ::GR1ND3R | 2 / 3 | Horror grammar, dream logic, film studies |
| ::ETCETER4 | 2 / 3 | Sound design, sampling as narrative, live performance |
